displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #61: Screams in the Void
synopsis:
An Imperial armada led by Admiral Mils Giel's flagship transports a captured Teezl toward the Imperial capital. The Empire intends to exploit the creature's abilities to enable instantaneous communication across the galaxy. Aware of the plan, the Rebel Alliance sends four pilots, Luke Skywalker, Shira Brie, Hanc Thorben, and Alph, in modified TIE fighters to pose as a returning Imperial patrol and attack the armada from within.

Giel orders the Teezl to jam all frequencies except the Imperial war band, cutting off the Rebels' modified channel. Luke locates the flagship holding the Teezl but finds a TIE fighter in his line of fire. Unable to confirm whether it is friend or foe by comms, he reaches out with the Force, which tells him the fighter is an enemy. He destroys it and then disables the ship carrying the Teezl, killing the creature. Returning to Arbra, Luke learns that Thorben recovered a visual recording of the battle, and the footage reveals that the pilot Luke shot down was fellow Rebel Shira Brie.
title: Star Wars (1977) #61: Screams in the Void
